title: Manner of enforcement
doc_html:
§1178. Manner of enforcement

            The renewable energy lessor may enforce his privilege in the same manner as the privilege accorded other lessors.

            Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
doc_text:
§1178.  Manner of enforcement
The renewable energy lessor may enforce his privilege in the same manner as the
privilege accorded other lessors.
Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
